title: Example task with a deadline
desc: This is a placeholder so the system has data to render on first run. Delete it once you've added a real task. The `desc` field is free-form prose; line breaks are preserved.
comment: Free-form note for yourself or for Claude. Used as context when generating the suggested plan.
solution:
## One-line verdict
Replace this example with a real task — open `check_in.html` in your browser to see what the page looks like.

## Steps
1. Edit `scripts/tasks_v3.json` (this file).
2. Run `node scripts/build_check_in.js` to regenerate the page.
3. Run `node scripts/build_per_task_recs.js` to regenerate the per-task rec pages.

title: Example task with subtasks
desc: Tasks with logical sub-items can carry them inside a `subtasks: [{text, done}]` array. `pickup_actions.js` auto-marks the parent done when every subtask is checked.
